creator: flynn@energyhq.homeip.net
text:
kwinacqua is a native window decoration engine for KDE2 that mimics
the Aqua windows found in MacOS X. The perfect combination with mosfet-liquid to make
your KDE desktop look like MacOS X.

WWW: http://tortoreto.it/aronnax/linux.html

Miguel Mendez <flynn@energyhq.homeip.net>

How-To-Repeat: 	cvsup when commited :)
